items.title: Respond to Barak at Opti with next steps on round terms
items.context: Email from Richie to IC Extended on Jun 16: 'We indicated to Barak that we would bring the terms back to the group and follow up with next steps.' Round is ~$16M at ~$75-80M pre-money with Mayfield and YL Ventures co-leading.

items.title: Internal decision on Opti check size (~$2M vs proposed $4M allocation)
items.context: Email from Richie on Jun 16: 'I recommend leaning in here pending continued DD + our getting comfortable with our check size (i.e. rightsizing closer to ~$2M).' Barak proposed $4M allocation for Fin Capital.

items.title: Follow up with Matt Polak at VanishID on round/term sheet update (~1 week)
items.context: Email from Matt Polak on Jun 18: 'We have been going back and forth on some term sheets. I hope to have an update in the next week or so.' Derek acknowledged and asked to stay in the loop.

items.title: Follow up on co-investment discussion with SMFL regarding Unstructured Series C
items.context: Calendar event 'Co-investment Discussion: Unstructured' on Jun 19 with SMFL (Takeshi Fujiwara, Kazuki Kyotani, Yohei Kawana), Atlas Beyond, and Fin Capital team. Series C process was expected to kick off after Q1.

items.title: Prep for SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on Jun 24 with 20+ attendees from SMBC, Atlas Beyond, and Fin Capital leadership.

items.title: Prep for meeting with Felix Rodriguez (Level AI)
items.context: Calendar event '30 Mins Meeting between Fan + Derek and Felix Rodriguez' on Jun 23 with felix@level.ai. New deal screening meeting.

items.title: Prep for meeting with Ron Blachar (Vivid Security)
items.context: Calendar event 'Jake Fuchs and Ron Blachar' on Jun 23 with ron@vivid.security. New deal screening meeting.
